arts.ttl: Exclusive: Manchester United scout Porto duo – including 17-year-old wonderkid
arts.sum: Manchester United scouts have watched over Porto players Samu Aghehowa and Rodrigo Mora in recent weeks, sources have told CaughtOffside. The Red Devils are thought to be eyeing a significant overhaul of their squad but are currently restricted on what they can do owing to spending limits under the Premier League’s profit and sustainability rules […] The post Exclusive: Manchester United scout Porto duo – including 17-year-old wonderkid appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Rolfes sees room for improvement for Aleix Garcia
arts.sum: Simon Rolfes believes Aleix Garcia will step up his game in the second half of the season after a difficult first few months at Bayer Leverkusen.

Despite a good display, Nacional left Vila do Conde without any points last time out. In their last four home games they've picked up seven points, losing only to Benfica, which should worry FC Porto....
